title: Recognition | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
Fragomen is distinguished as the top immigration services provider in many major markets. Our commitment to inclusion and dedication to our clients have been recognized by leading authorities around the world.

### Firm and Lawyer Rankings
Australasian Lawyer 2023 Recognised Fragomen as a 5-Star Employer of Choice in the publication’s Employer of Choice Report, celebrating Australia’s best legal employers.
Recognised Fragomen as a 5-Star Employer of Choice in the publication’s Employer of Choice Report, celebrating Australia’s best legal employers.
Chambers Global (Chambers and Partners) 2014-2025 Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP in “Band 1” from 2014 to 2025. This is the highest possible ranking in the immigration category.
Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP in “Band 1” from 2014 to 2025. This is the highest possible ranking in the immigration category.
Chambers USA (Chambers and Partners) 2014-2025 Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP in “Band 1” from 2014 to 2025. This is the highest possible ranking in the immigration category.
Chambers UK (Chambers and Partners) 2012-2024 Ranked Fragomen LLP in Band 1 in the “Immigration: High Net Worth (HNW) Individuals - UK-Wide” category in 2023 and 2024. Ranked Fragomen LLP in Band 1 from 2012 to 2019. This is the highest possible ranking in the immigration category.
Ranked Fragomen LLP in Band 1 in the “Immigration: High Net Worth (HNW) Individuals - UK-Wide” category in 2023 and 2024.
Ranked Fragomen LLP in Band 1 from 2012 to 2019. This is the highest possible ranking in the immigration category.
Who’s Who in Corporate Immigration Law (Law Business Research Ltd) 2023 Recognized 30+ Fragomen attorneys individually in 2023.
Recognized 30+ Fragomen attorneys individually in 2023.
Best Lawyers in America (Woodward/White, Inc.) 2026 Recognized 160+ Fragomen attorneys individually in the Immigration Law category.
Recognized 160+ Fragomen attorneys individually in the Immigration Law category.
Best Lawyers in Australia (Woodward/White, Inc.) 2026 Recognized four Fragomen (Australia) Pty Limited lawyers individually in the Immigration Law category.
Recognized four Fragomen (Australia) Pty Limited lawyers individually in the Immigration Law category.
Best Lawyers in Costa Rica (Woodward/White, Inc.) 2014-2020 Listed two Fragomen Costa Rica Immigration Services LLC Ltda. lawyers individually in the Immigration Law category in 2020, for the seventh year in a row, and named Fragomen the “top listed” firm (the firm with the most lawyers listed in the immigration law practice area) in Costa Rica.
Listed two Fragomen Costa Rica Immigration Services LLC Ltda. lawyers individually in the Immigration Law category in 2020, for the seventh year in a row, and named Fragomen the “top listed” firm (the firm with the most lawyers listed in the immigration law practice area) in Costa Rica.
Best Lawyers in the UK (Woodward/White, Inc.) 2025 Recognized nine Fragomen UK attorneys in the Immigration Law Category.
Recognized nine Fragomen UK attorneys in the Immigration Law Category.
The Times Best Law Firms (Times Newspapers Limited) 2019, 2024 Named Fragomen LLP to the list of the top 250 law firms in England and Wales for 2019 and 2024.
Named Fragomen LLP to the list of the top 250 law firms in England and Wales for 2019 and 2024.
U.S. News (U.S. News & World Report LP) and Best Lawyers (Woodward/White, Inc.) 2012-2015, 2017-2018, 2020, 2022, 2024 Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP  “Law Firm of the Year” in the Immigration Law category in the 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2017, 2018, 2020, 2022 and 2024 editions of U.S. News - Best Lawyers “Best Law Firms.”
Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP  “Law Firm of the Year” in the Immigration Law category in the 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2017, 2018, 2020, 2022 and 2024 editions of U.S. News - Best Lawyers “Best Law Firms.”
The American Lawyer 2023 Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP a finalist in the “Legal Services Innovation” category of the 2023 Industry Awards.
BusinessRiver 2023 Recognized Fragomen Ireland with the “CX Impact in Professional Services” Award.
The Employee Mobility Institute 2023 Named Fragomen Australia, in partnership with Talent Beyond Boundaries, the winner of the “Best Corporate & Service Provider Partnership” Award.
Named Fragomen Australia, in partnership with Talent Beyond Boundaries, the winner of the “Best Corporate & Service Provider Partnership” Award.
Forum for Expatriate Management (Centaur Media PLC Group) 2012-2025 Americas Immigration Provider of the Year – 2015, 2017, 2021, 2022, 2025 Outstanding Agility & Crisis Management (Service Provider) – 2022, 2024, 2025 Thought Leadership – Best Survey or Research Study of the Year (Worldwide Immigration Trends Report) – 2021, 2023, 2024, 2025 Thought Leadership – Best Survey or Research Study of the Year (COVID-19 Entry Rules Platform) – 2022 Best Partnership Between a Corporate Organization and a Service Provider (with Talent Beyond Boundaries) – 2023 APAC Immigration Provider of the Year – 2023 Outstanding Agility & Crisis Management (Service Provider) – 2022 Thought Leadership – Best Survey or Research Study of the Year (Worldwide Immigration Trends Report) – 2022, 2024, 2025 Best Partnership Between a Corporate Organization and a Service Provider (with Talent Beyond Boundaries) – 2024, 2025 EMEA Immigration Provider of the Year – 2012-2016, 2019, 2021-2023 Best Partnership Between a Corporate Organization and a Service Provider (with Talent Beyond Boundaries) – 2021-2025 Most Innovative Use of Technology in Global Mobility – Assignee Management – 2022

Public Sector Magazine 2023 Recognized Fragomen Ireland with the “Excellence in Immigration Services” Award.
Recognized Fragomen Ireland with the “Excellence in Immigration Services” Award.
The Recorder 2023 Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP a winner of the Vanguard Award, which spotlights a handful of companies and products that are agents of change.
Who’s Who Legal (Law Business Research Ltd) 2005-2023 Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP “Corporate Immigration Firm of the Year” for the past 19 years.
Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP “Corporate Immigration Firm of the Year” for the past 19 years.
National Law Journal (ALM Media Properties, LLC) 2022-2023 Named Fragomen Technologies, Inc. to its Legal Technology Trailblazers list.
New York Law Journal (ALM Media Properties, LLC) 2020 Recognized Fragomen with the Innovation Award, for helping clients through forward-thinking approaches led by the firm’s Immigration Technology Innovation Lab.
New Jersey Law Journal (ALM Media Properties, LLC) 2020 Recognized Fragomen’s Knowledge Group with the Innovator Award, for tackling legal issues creatively.
National Law Journal (ALM Media Properties, LLC) 2020 Named Fragomen’s Mail Processing Operation Center to its Emerging Legal Technologies list.

### Diversity Awards and Rankings
The American Lawyer (ALM Media Properties, LLC) 2012-2025 Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP among the top five law firms for ethnic diversity from 2012 to 2022 and in 2024 in The American Lawyer’s Diversity Scorecard, including the top law firm in 2019 and from 2022-2025.
Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP among the top five law firms for ethnic diversity from 2012 to 2022 and in 2024 in The American Lawyer’s Diversity Scorecard, including the top law firm in 2019 and from 2022-2025.
National Law Journal (ALM Media Properties, LLC) 2012-2022 Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP as one of the top two law firms on its annual “Women in Law Scorecard” from 2012 to 2022, including the #1 law firm from 2012 to 2018, naming Fragomen as the firm most inclusive of women amongst the largest law firms in the United States.
Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP as one of the top two law firms on its annual “Women in Law Scorecard” from 2012 to 2022, including the #1 law firm from 2012 to 2018, naming Fragomen as the firm most inclusive of women amongst the largest law firms in the United States.
Crain’s New York Business (Crain Communications, Inc.) 2022 Recognized Fragomen as a Diversity Champion for its commitment to a diverse workforce and programs advancing the promotion of diversity in the workplace.
Recognized Fragomen as a Diversity Champion for its commitment to a diverse workforce and programs advancing the promotion of diversity in the workplace.
Law360 (Portfolio Media, Inc.) 2017-2024 Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP first among the top U.S. law firms of its size for minority attorneys and equity partners in its 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023 and 2024 “Diversity Snapshot.” Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP first among the top U.S. law firms of its size for female attorneys and equity partners in its 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 and 2021 “Glass Ceiling Report.” Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP first among its 2023 “Women in Law” list, indicating whether firms are keeping pace with the talent pipeline in hiring, promoting and retaining female attorneys.
Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP first among the top U.S. law firms of its size for minority attorneys and equity partners in its 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023 and 2024 “Diversity Snapshot.”
Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP first among the top U.S. law firms of its size for female attorneys and equity partners in its 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 and 2021 “Glass Ceiling Report.”
Ranked Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP first among its 2023 “Women in Law” list, indicating whether firms are keeping pace with the talent pipeline in hiring, promoting and retaining female attorneys.
Diversity & Flexibility Alliance 2021 Recognized Fragomen for “Tipping the Scales” towards gender parity in its New Partner Report, given that more than 50% of the firm’s 2021 new U.S.-based partners are women.
Recognized Fragomen for “Tipping the Scales” towards gender parity in its New Partner Report, given that more than 50% of the firm’s 2021 new U.S.-based partners are women.
Chambers USA Diversity & Inclusion Awards 2024 Shortlisted Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP in the “Diversity and Inclusion: Outstanding Firm” category.
Shortlisted Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP in the “Diversity and Inclusion: Outstanding Firm” category.
The Women in Law Empowerment Forum 2022-2023 Awarded Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP with its 2023 Gold Standard Certification, granted to major firms that meet objective criteria concerning the number of women among equity partners, in firm leadership positions, and in the ranks of the most highly compensated partners.
Awarded Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP with its 2023 Gold Standard Certification, granted to major firms that meet objective criteria concerning the number of women among equity partners, in firm leadership positions, and in the ranks of the most highly compensated partners.
ILAP’s “Pro Bono Law Firm of the Year” 2024 Recognized as the Immigrant Legal Advocacy Project’s “Pro Bono Law Firm of the Year” after serving as a key partner in the organization’s asylum assistance efforts.
Recognized as the Immigrant Legal Advocacy Project’s “Pro Bono Law Firm of the Year” after serving as a key partner in the organization’s asylum assistance efforts.
The American Lawyer 2024 Fragomen is ranked on The American Lawyer ’s 2024 Pro Bono Scorecard, a chart listing Am Law 200 firms by their pro bono score for work performed by US-based lawyers.
Fragomen is ranked on The American Lawyer ’s 2024 Pro Bono Scorecard, a chart listing Am Law 200 firms by their pro bono score for work performed by US-based lawyers.
City Bar Justice Center 2018 Recognized Fragomen for its leadership and dedication to pro bono and public service at the City Bar Justice Center’s 13th Annual Gala.
Recognized Fragomen for its leadership and dedication to pro bono and public service at the City Bar Justice Center’s 13th Annual Gala.
City University of New York “Service to Immigrants Award” 2016 Recognized Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP for its pro bono contributions to the 2016 CUNY/Daily News Citizenship NOW! Call-In event (the first time that a private firm has been honored).
Recognized Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP for its pro bono contributions to the 2016 CUNY/Daily News Citizenship NOW! Call-In event (the first time that a private firm has been honored).
Casa Cornelia Law Center 2014 Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP “Law Firm of the Year” in 2014 for the firm’s dedication to the organization’s pro bono program.
Named Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP “Law Firm of the Year” in 2014 for the firm’s dedication to the organization’s pro bono program.
